name: /postmortem appends a dated heading entry to FAILURE-LOG.md per the F-1 closing append-to-FAILURE-LOG clause
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" 'token leak in error message' 2>err.txt && [ -s FAILURE-LOG.md ] && grep -qE '^### [0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}' FAILURE-LOG.md && grep -q 'token leak in error message' FAILURE-LOG.md && echo logged 1>&2
